scripts.db:start: podman run -d --name smart-files-db -p 127.0.0.1:5432:5432 -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=smartfiles -v ./data/postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data:Z --replace postgres:16-alpine
scripts.db:stop: podman stop -t 5 smart-files-db && podman rm smart-files-db
scripts.deploy:api: npm run prd:backendbuild && pm2 restart smart-files-backend
scripts.version: node -e "var r=require('./package.json'),m=require('./packages/mobile/package.json');m.version=r.version;require('fs').writeFileSync('packages/mobile/package.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2)+'\n');console.log('mobile version synced ->',r.version)" && git add packages/mobile/package.json
